rationale: The proposed change concerns Tax Code §11.13(b) residence homestead exemption amounts. Fam. Code §54.03 governs juvenile adjudication hearings and is wholly unrelated; no conflict exists.
quote: A child may be found to have engaged in delinquent conduct or conduct indicating a need for supervision only after an adjudication hearing conducted in accordance with the provisions of this section.
_note: Rule text is from an unrelated statute (juvenile justice proceedings); no overlap with the proposed homestead exemption change.
